items.summary: Front cover of Goethe-Zertifikat A1 Start Deutsch 1 model set.
Imprint page with edition, copyright, and design credits.
Table of contents listing exam sections and page numbers.
Intentionally blank page with only logo and page number.
Foreword describing A1 exam scope and can-do skills.
Blank page with only the page number.
Listening section intro and general test instructions.
Listening Part 1 instructions with worked example on room number.
Listening Part 1 items on price, time, and restaurant food.
Listening Part 1 items on school class, floor access, travel.
Listening Part 2 true/false announcements at station and store.
Listening Part 3 items on phone number and meeting point.
Listening Part 3 items on day of visit and broken device.
Blank page with only the page number.
Reading and Writing section intro and instructions.
Reading Part 1 true/false about an email on train arrival.
Reading Part 1 true/false about a birthday party invitation.
Reading Part 2 matching websites for weather and Rhine boats.
Reading Part 2 matching websites for language courses and tickets.
Reading Part 2 matching websites for lake info and train times.
Reading Part 3 true/false on signs about language school breakfast.
Reading Part 3 true/false on post office and station signs.
Reading Part 3 true/false on restaurant and bus stop signs.
Writing Part 1 form-filling for a Bodensee bus tour registration.
Writing Part 2 letter to Dresden tourist information office.
Intentionally blank page with only logo and page number.
Speaking section intro describing the group oral exam.
Speaking Part 1 self-introduction prompts: name, age, country, hobby.
Speaking Part 2 cards asking for information on food and drink.
Speaking Part 2 cards on shopping topics like fruit and shoes.
Speaking Part 3 picture cards prompting requests from objects.
Speaking Part 3 additional picture cards of everyday objects.
Listening transcripts for Part 1 example and items 1-3.
Listening transcripts for Part 1 items 4-6.
Listening transcripts for Part 2 announcements 7-10.
Listening transcripts for Part 3 phone messages 11-15.
Answer key for Listening, Reading, and Writing Part 1.
Writing scoring criteria with sample candidate texts and grades.
Examiner notes and scripts for oral exam Part 1.
Examiner scripts for spelling, numbers, and Speaking Part 2.
Examiner notes and scripts for Speaking Part 3 requests.
Speaking assessment scoring scale for examiners.
Answer sheet with marking grids for Listening, Reading, Writing.
Answer sheet writing area and Writing Part 2 scoring grid.
Notes page with only heading and page number.
Blank page with only title and page number.
Back cover with printer and version codes.
